steps.t: Talk to Elder Roshat in the Elder Hall.
Elder Roshat has asked you to go to the hills east of Khûtra, to the cliffs facing south near the ruins of the Mâkhda Khorbo and investigate the sourc…
A noxious blight is seeping from these broken stones. Patch up the stones and seal the wellspring!
Talk to Heshra, the herbalist in the Elder Hall.
